data.title: Steve Madden steps forward to buy Kurt Geiger
data.description: In a deal valued at $365 million, Steve Madden stands to absorb Kurt Geiger's portfolio of brands.

data.title: Fabletics brings Blue Yonder tools into its supply chain and expansion plans
data.description: Blue Yonder and Plantensive will both play roles as Fabletics looks to grow its global footprint in 2025.

data.title: AI, analytics and IoT are top priorities for procurement managers
data.description: 38% of procurement leaders identified enhancing data analytics and spending visibility tools as their top initiatives for the next 12 months.

data.title: Blue Yonder reports $1.36 billion in 2024 revenue and expands AI
data.description: In its fiscal year 2024, the company added 132 new customers, and its latest product release introduced AI-driven enhancements to supply chain planning, warehouse management, and logistics.

data.title: AI-enhanced ecommerce helps boost 2024 sales for US Foods
data.description: CEO David Flitman emphasized US Foods’ dominance in digital sales during the year-end earnings call, highlighting record-high ecommerce sales penetration in 2024.
